category_sources: source_facts.description: Optical Character Recognition (OCR), converts images back to text; official GOCR page describes it as OCR converting scanned text images to text files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name: gocr; official GOCR site says the original name is GOCR and it is also hosted as JOCR on SourceForge.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Uni-Magdeburg GOCR page; official SourceForge mirror states Uni-Magdeburg is the main page and describes the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GOCR pages provide source tarball downloads and mention historic CVS access, but no current official source-control project URL was verified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies OCR and image-to-text conversion; source_facts.executables lists gocr and gocr.tcl.
